# Azure Resource Visualizer Skill (Minimal)

**When to Use** — Post-deployment visualization, brownfield assessment, drift detection, as-built documentation.

**Workflow** — Scope selection → Resource Graph discovery → relationship mapping → Mermaid diagram generation → file output.

**Relationship Types** — Network, peering, diagnostics, private endpoints, managed identity, Log Analytics links.

**Diagram Rules** — Group by CAF area (Management, Connectivity, Identity, Security); include SKU annotations and security indicators.

**Constraints** — Read-only, Resource Graph preferred, Mermaid for GitHub rendering, split at 50+ resources.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
